Flat concept inventory:
- LLMs align with ever-changing world knowledge | papers: e165b379f983152874299e0f5a6e0c9596c9a3e8; 7805db74210aa113e83f20ffd0ad1ebcbb12ed7a; 240b0caabb415578bdea4da7d0a32bdff2e8163f; f727f928e7e179307d8d4a1da2387393f2bd7915; a206a0c96d6076c6ab081288b0c2c95d3c7efd64; 9286ac6e9b1aacd7d93496eb4615ae7678876d2a; a5d3a865b71f3f424ba31e037848028f60161478; 996445d847f06e99b0bd259345408a0cf1bce87e; 628b131f8f309d583ccf1da268f520c051169ddd; 2c871df72c52b58f05447fcb3afc838168d94505; 133b97e40017a9bbbadd10bcd7f13088a97ca3cc; c96578f276a6d699549eca5a5b3bfa13b14ad804; a95ee02fd85a3734bf19bb4bbc6ef3ea22c96cc9; 2fe1ac0b09cc0f50eb83eef6c7c6b45ac8b12413; 1fdf449c96fbac0789cf8dfae15b788905407fd3; 70ae98c70c0235acf3c3af14ea7286c81da1febe; b79f039c5ea5916d8e70b98e722de4ae1bc8fa05; c0ad57eb5e38c86ff52dde7dbebac7ae26522e48; ff2a0fb125e7f03428420230c6ecbeafd4cf07a8; f2f3c83db919a2429c4fcad2d0a0ed4e5294354a; e3ec55e9e6720194a0ed5d4033d93a941c8a4f99; bc7984bfcfae537dbe633eeeb8d69c42a994c724; d304d0bdfa81fd10b187aa0e4f41d410eb19d6e3; ce828f9986b196308a3e40b1de58af1e8e68d728; e053be7f36a0772b68eaaa14f15650c14071e4ab; e9b3e82b1c9eb4136df28e94f24cd823431be93b; 9121b7e4cb8d8d241574e7066a8aadcda93b4828; 4f03e69963b9649950ba29ae864a0de8c14f1f86; 193955704f66923ac20a664bd184ed4663b2bdf9; c53e3020e4b8f9e1cd7b6ed35221480a2647ea26; ed8931af08ce757a92a01ed43a0619522e10e8ff; f00d907307e8fb5f9f297a0c94fe32c70132e854; 992cff59f13f5944a74eb2e62a8cb11849204780; 560b1bc012588731b26748e33236570df777baa0; a9be51698e7c2247853b7b6f1f70fc4d6d7ef605; bd742d976aa0a7dfa91eb3e4a9136a00d763efd1; 011c2b5a08c32e57f7c55539a1944bc733f83aa3; 7be8c119dbe065c52125ee7716601751f3116844; a8b896d5dd327ac808bcbcf4e4ed324a4615c356; 0c47eb31b2dd76d8dc986173a1d3f00da1c9c74d; f92535edac9d1c735feabdb4d94c1157f12d899c; 563a851106623b9f112d0e2a290d3950a871079c; e7d75b80e0fa3ae190ff91676dbf18a006d3a311; 448e1493034dafe35699ae054ff4480b31dcf64a; 1d650f1afd45c59ff907396fe8b678595dcb85ea; 188aa594c294f01fd18e0ff43eeb0d8430b39b90; 56e952fd463accff09cf2e35432aaabd7c7c57f3; c6ee979c2da4b55a8486abae4cd720422ab09b26; 465471bb5bf1a945549d6291c2d23367966b4957; 07b14c24833400b79978b0a5f084803337e30a15; c8d594f09413b1555970f43e68847c211235d60f; 24811cadf16519910f643b6084107164e6ca4219; d60bc65862c9aca2b4c18595cc1d0f34cadaf4cf; 66242baf48b0f6b828e7547ac39ffaa5e1b2cb3e; 03532123ccffae8d411264320e8a5ae2b6eddea0; 07955e96cbd778d0ae2a68f09d073b866dd84c2a; 0d42221038c05cee8443c5b5af838505ee137dc3; e5c72b92c48d68594b290c84a8904da7c8335554; e070ff286709db28312e08b52b05539debe88146; a1675f47125aa409525c5f759b5e6bcc1c8831aa; f208ea909fa7f54fea82def9a92fd81dfc758c39; 99832586d55f540f603637e458a292406a0ed75d; 70ca38ad480c0be0eca89ccc4972d6cc9a5824da; c70eb74e09c41e8fcc71dd59e3b4d631f657f7cd; - Implicit | papers: e165b379f983152874299e0f5a6e0c9596c9a3e8; 7805db74210aa113e83f20ffd0ad1ebcbb12ed7a; 240b0caabb415578bdea4da7d0a32bdff2e8163f; f727f928e7e179307d8d4a1da2387393f2bd7915; a206a0c96d6076c6ab081288b0c2c95d3c7efd64; 9286ac6e9b1aacd7d93496eb4615ae7678876d2a; a5d3a865b71f3f424ba31e037848028f60161478; 996445d847f06e99b0bd259345408a0cf1bce87e; 628b131f8f309d583ccf1da268f520c051169ddd; 2c871df72c52b58f05447fcb3afc838168d94505; 133b97e40017a9bbbadd10bcd7f13088a97ca3cc; c96578f276a6d699549eca5a5b3bfa13b14ad804; a95ee02fd85a3734bf19bb4bbc6ef3ea22c96cc9; 2fe1ac0b09cc0f50eb83eef6c7c6b45ac8b12413; 1fdf449c96fbac0789cf8dfae15b788905407fd3; 70ae98c70c0235acf3c3af14ea7286c81da1febe; b79f039c5ea5916d8e70b98e722de4ae1bc8fa05; c0ad57eb5e38c86ff52dde7dbebac7ae26522e48; ff2a0fb125e7f03428420230c6ecbeafd4cf07a8; f2f3c83db919a2429c4fcad2d0a0ed4e5294354a; e3ec55e9e6720194a0ed5d4033d93a941c8a4f99; bc7984bfcfae537dbe633eeeb8d69c42a994c724; d304d0bdfa81fd10b187aa0e4f41d410eb19d6e3; ce828f9986b196308a3e40b1de58af1e8e68d728; e053be7f36a0772b68eaaa14f15650c14071e4ab; e9b3e82b1c9eb4136df28e94f24cd823431be93b; 9121b7e4cb8d8d241574e7066a8aadcda93b4828; 4f03e69963b9649950ba29ae864a0de8c14f1f86; 193955704f66923ac20a664bd184ed4663b2bdf9; c53e3020e4b8f9e1cd7b6ed35221480a2647ea26; ed8931af08ce757a92a01ed43a0619522e10e8ff; f00d907307e8fb5f9f297a0c94fe32c70132e854; 992cff59f13f5944a74eb2e62a8cb11849204780; 560b1bc012588731b26748e33236570df777baa0; a9be51698e7c2247853b7b6f1f70fc4d6d7ef605; bd742d976aa0a7dfa91eb3e4a9136a00d763efd1; 011c2b5a08c32e57f7c55539a1944bc733f83aa3
- Knowledge Editing | papers: e165b379f983152874299e0f5a6e0c9596c9a3e8; 7805db74210aa113e83f20ffd0ad1ebcbb12ed7a; 240b0caabb415578bdea4da7d0a32bdff2e8163f; f727f928e7e179307d8d4a1da2387393f2bd7915; a206a0c96d6076c6ab081288b0c2c95d3c7efd64; 9286ac6e9b1aacd7d93496eb4615ae7678876d2a; a5d3a865b71f3f424ba31e037848028f60161478; 996445d847f06e99b0bd259345408a0cf1bce87e; 628b131f8f309d583ccf1da268f520c051169ddd; 2c871df72c52b58f05447fcb3afc838168d94505; 133b97e40017a9bbbadd10bcd7f13088a97ca3cc; c96578f276a6d699549eca5a5b3bfa13b14ad804; a95ee02fd85a3734bf19bb4bbc6ef3ea22c96cc9; 2fe1ac0b09cc0f50eb83eef6c7c6b45ac8b12413; 1fdf449c96fbac0789cf8dfae15b788905407fd3; 70ae98c70c0235acf3c3af14ea7286c81da1febe; b79f039c5ea5916d8e70b98e722de4ae1bc8fa05; c0ad57eb5e38c86ff52dde7dbebac7ae26522e48; ff2a0fb125e7f03428420230c6ecbeafd4cf07a8

- Continual Learning | papers: f2f3c83db919a2429c4fcad2d0a0ed4e5294354a; e3ec55e9e6720194a0ed5d4033d93a941c8a4f99; bc7984bfcfae537dbe633eeeb8d69c42a994c724; d304d0bdfa81fd10b187aa0e4f41d410eb19d6e3; ce828f9986b196308a3e40b1de58af1e8e68d728; e053be7f36a0772b68eaaa14f15650c14071e4ab; e9b3e82b1c9eb4136df28e94f24cd823431be93b; 9121b7e4cb8d8d241574e7066a8aadcda93b4828; 4f03e69963b9649950ba29ae864a0de8c14f1f86; 193955704f66923ac20a664bd184ed4663b2bdf9; c53e3020e4b8f9e1cd7b6ed35221480a2647ea26; ed8931af08ce757a92a01ed43a0619522e10e8ff; f00d907307e8fb5f9f297a0c94fe32c70132e854; 992cff59f13f5944a74eb2e62a8cb11849204780; 560b1bc012588731b26748e33236570df777baa0; a9be51698e7c2247853b7b6f1f70fc4d6d7ef605; bd742d976aa0a7dfa91eb3e4a9136a00d763efd1; 011c2b5a08c32e57f7c55539a1944bc733f83aa3
- Continual Pre-training | papers: f2f3c83db919a2429c4fcad2d0a0ed4e5294354a; e3ec55e9e6720194a0ed5d4033d93a941c8a4f99; bc7984bfcfae537dbe633eeeb8d69c42a994c724; d304d0bdfa81fd10b187aa0e4f41d410eb19d6e3; ce828f9986b196308a3e40b1de58af1e8e68d728; e053be7f36a0772b68eaaa14f15650c14071e4ab; e9b3e82b1c9eb4136df28e94f24cd823431be93b; 9121b7e4cb8d8d241574e7066a8aadcda93b4828; 4f03e69963b9649950ba29ae864a0de8c14f1f86; 193955704f66923ac20a664bd184ed4663b2bdf9; c53e3020e4b8f9e1cd7b6ed35221480a2647ea26; ed8931af08ce757a92a01ed43a0619522e10e8ff; f00d907307e8fb5f9f297a0c94fe32c70132e854; 992cff59f13f5944a74eb2e62a8cb11849204780

- Explicit | papers: 7be8c119dbe065c52125ee7716601751f3116844; a8b896d5dd327ac808bcbcf4e4ed324a4615c356; 0c47eb31b2dd76d8dc986173a1d3f00da1c9c74d; f00d907307e8fb5f9f297a0c94fe32c70132e854; f92535edac9d1c735feabdb4d94c1157f12d899c; 563a851106623b9f112d0e2a290d3950a871079c; e7d75b80e0fa3ae190ff91676dbf18a006d3a311; 448e1493034dafe35699ae054ff4480b31dcf64a; 1d650f1afd45c59ff907396fe8b678595dcb85ea; 188aa594c294f01fd18e0ff43eeb0d8430b39b90; 56e952fd463accff09cf2e35432aaabd7c7c57f3; c6ee979c2da4b55a8486abae4cd720422ab09b26; 465471bb5bf1a945549d6291c2d23367966b4957; 07b14c24833400b79978b0a5f084803337e30a15; c8d594f09413b1555970f43e68847c211235d60f; 24811cadf16519910f643b6084107164e6ca4219; ff2a0fb125e7f03428420230c6ecbeafd4cf07a8; d60bc65862c9aca2b4c18595cc1d0f34cadaf4cf; 66242baf48b0f6b828e7547ac39ffaa5e1b2cb3e; 03532123ccffae8d411264320e8a5ae2b6eddea0; 07955e96cbd778d0ae2a68f09d073b866dd84c2a; 0d42221038c05cee8443c5b5af838505ee137dc3; e5c72b92c48d68594b290c84a8904da7c8335554; e070ff286709db28312e08b52b05539debe88146; a1675f47125aa409525c5f759b5e6bcc1c8831aa; f208ea909fa7f54fea82def9a92fd81dfc758c39; 99832586d55f540f603637e458a292406a0ed75d; 70ca38ad480c0be0eca89ccc4972d6cc9a5824da; c70eb74e09c41e8fcc71dd59e3b4d631f657f7cd; ac7771c332da42b29a913b116bd6ef622cbf89cf; 170c97c7215f42edfb20c2248f954879e91ef86e; c7a9c7302a72301ed79a7c0696d5af2e03ad3ac4; a19193ef534619654d3252d4034ef154407562dc
- Memory-enhanced | papers: 7be8c119dbe065c52125ee7716601751f3116844; a8b896d5dd327ac808bcbcf4e4ed324a4615c356; 0c47eb31b2dd76d8dc986173a1d3f00da1c9c74d; f00d907307e8fb5f9f297a0c94fe32c70132e854; f92535edac9d1c735feabdb4d94c1157f12d899c; 563a851106623b9f112d0e2a290d3950a871079c; e7d75b80e0fa3ae190ff91676dbf18a006d3a311; 448e1493034dafe35699ae054ff4480b31dcf64a; 1d650f1afd45c59ff907396fe8b678595dcb85ea; 188aa594c294f01fd18e0ff43eeb0d8430b39b90; 56e952fd463accff09cf2e35432aaabd7c7c57f3

- Retrieval-enhanced | papers: c6ee979c2da4b55a8486abae4cd720422ab09b26; 465471bb5bf1a945549d6291c2d23367966b4957; 07b14c24833400b79978b0a5f084803337e30a15; c8d594f09413b1555970f43e68847c211235d60f; 24811cadf16519910f643b6084107164e6ca4219; ff2a0fb125e7f03428420230c6ecbeafd4cf07a8; d60bc65862c9aca2b4c18595cc1d0f34cadaf4cf; 66242baf48b0f6b828e7547ac39ffaa5e1b2cb3e; 03532123ccffae8d411264320e8a5ae2b6eddea0; 07955e96cbd778d0ae2a68f09d073b866dd84c2a; 0d42221038c05cee8443c5b5af838505ee137dc3; e5c72b92c48d68594b290c84a8904da7c8335554; e070ff286709db28312e08b52b05539debe88146; a1675f47125aa409525c5f759b5e6bcc1c8831aa; f208ea909fa7f54fea82def9a92fd81dfc758c39; 99832586d55f540f603637e458a292406a0ed75d

- Internet-enhanced | papers: 70ca38ad480c0be0eca89ccc4972d6cc9a5824da; c70eb74e09c41e8fcc71dd59e3b4d631f657f7cd; ac7771c332da42b29a913b116bd6ef622cbf89cf; 170c97c7215f42edfb20c2248f954879e91ef86e; c7a9c7302a72301ed79a7c0696d5af2e03ad3ac4; a19193ef534619654d3252d4034ef154407562dc
